programme.title: Past Tense
programme.desc: A young woman and her best friend have their lives turned around when the woman's future self shows up in the present, and she isn't anything they expected.

programme.title: Alone/Together
programme.desc: College sweethearts Christine and Raf meet again for the first time, eight years after their breakup. As both now live a life different from each other, their reunion takes them back to their youth, their dreams, and the feelings they shared back in the day.

programme.title: To Be Announced

programme.title: Of All The Things
programme.desc: A professional fixer has a friendly yet contentious relationship with a notary public. As the two wrangle over their principles, a romance begins to blossom between them.

programme.title: Ang Pamilyang Hindi Lumuluha
programme.desc: Only the famous family that doesn't weep can help reunite a desperate woman with her own.

programme.title: Secret Of Feriha The Untold Story
